title: Hadoop MapReduce Join Operations
description: The 'lib/join' directory contains specialized RecordReaders for composite joins. 'JoinRecordReader.java' uses PriorityQueue and reflection for managing key-value pairs. 'OverrideRecordReader.java' prioritizes the rightmost data source per key, showcasing Composite and Priority Queue patterns. These enhance Hadoop's handling of complex data relationships during join operations.
